title: Credit/debt: udhaar
content:
term_roman: "udhaar"
variants: ["udhar", "udharo", "udaro", "credit"]
direction_ambiguity: "outbound_credit"
typical_patterns: ["Ram lai 500 udhaar", "udharo ma becheko"]
meaning_en: "credit given / receivable"

title: Credit/debt: baki
content:
term_roman: "baki"
variants: ["baki cha", "outstanding"]
direction_ambiguity: "ambiguous"
typical_patterns: ["500 baki cha", "baki tirnu baki"]
meaning_en: "remaining balance — direction from context"

title: Credit/debt: rin
content:
term_roman: "rin"
variants: ["loan", "karz", "karja"]
direction_ambiguity: "inbound_debt"
typical_patterns: ["bank bata rin liyo", "loan liye"]
meaning_en: "loan / debt"

title: Credit/debt: debtor
content:
term_roman: "debtor"
